properties.dose: Light: 5-10mg Common: 10-20mg Strong: 20-35mg+ NOTE: these doses are not intended for opioid naïve users. 30mg could be lethal for an opioid naïve user. Please note opioid naïve refers to recent usage, not opioid experience. It is recommended, as always, to start low and increase dosage /slowly/
properties.duration: Oral 6-12 hours. NOTE: The duration may last much longer depending on a variety of factors, such as physical and mental drug dependence.
properties.effects: Euphoria, Dry Mouth, Mood lift, Itchiness, Relaxant, Constipation, Pupil constriction, Analgesia.
properties.half-life: 12-18 hours on the first dose 13-47 on concurrent
properties.summary: An opioid drug used as an analgesic and is often used during detoxification of other opioids. There are a variety of reasons for this such as methadone's longer half-life duration.

_general: Methadone trials have proven successful in treating Heroin addiction - http://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/article-abstract/656315
